# NLTagger.AssetsResult.error

**Case**

The framework couldn’t load the asset due to an error.

## Declaration

```swift
case error
```

## Asset request responses

- **NLTagger.AssetsResult.available**: The asset is now available and loaded onto the device.
- **NLTagger.AssetsResult.notAvailable**: The asset is unavailable on the device.

items.description: The asset is now available and loaded onto the device.
items.name: NLTagger.AssetsResult.available

items.description: The asset is unavailable on the device.
items.name: NLTagger.AssetsResult.notAvailable
